_comment: schema.org Organization sameAs source (ENTITY-FOOTPRINT-W1). null = profile not yet live -> EXCLUDED from sameAs output. To add a profile once it is live + claimed: flip its null to the public profile URL, then run `node scripts/generate_jsonld.mjs` and commit. Render order = key order below (github first = strongest dev-tool profile per Google's 2026-04-15 sameAs guidance; 4-7 strong entries beat long lists). Consumed keys: github, x, npm, crunchbase, g2, capterra, wikidata. wikidata gets a URL ONLY after the item exists and survives (see docs/WIKIDATA-DEFERRED.md).
